{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>11. Bey Herrn Daniel Hag dem Buchbinder sind folgende Bücher, in nachgesetztem Preiß zu verkauffen;
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Justi Lipsii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Epistolarum Centuriae complet</TITLE>, in <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> apud Plautin. <PRIZE>1. Gulden 36. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Politicorum Libri</TITLE>.
  <BIBL><TITLE>Monita</TITLE> <VOLUME>8e Exempla politica</VOLUME>.</BIBL>
  <BIBL><TITLE>De Magnirudine Romana</TITLE>.</BIBL>
  <BIBL><TITLE>De Constantia</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> ibid. <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 36.</PRIZE></BIBL>
</BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Militia Romana cum An. fig.</TITLE> <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>-ibid. <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 30.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Poliorecticon de Machinis, Tormentis, Telis cum An.fig.</TITLE> <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 1. xr. 12.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>de Amphitheatro</TITLE>.
  <BIBL><TITLE>de Amphitheatris extra Romam, cum An.fig.</TITLE> <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>-ibid. <PRIZE>30. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL>
</BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Dissert. apud Principes Se C.Plinii Pane-Gyricus cum Commentar.</TITLE> <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>, ibid. <PRIZE>48. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>C. Corn. Taciti & Velleji Paterculi</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Opera cum Lipsii Commentariis</TITLE>, groß <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> ibid. <PRIZE>fl. 3.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Opera cum Notis Integris W. Heinsii & variorum</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>3. Theil</VOLUME> / <PLACE>Lugd.</PLACE> <PRIZE>fl. 7. xr. 12.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Gotthard Heideggers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Kleinere Teutsche Schrifften</TITLE> / <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> <PRIZE>30. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Delicia Urbis Bernae</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> <PRIZE>13. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Vernunfft-mäßige Undersuchung des Baades zu Baaden, mit Kupfferen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> <PRIZE>11. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Vernunfft-mäßige Undersuchung des Baades zu Baaden, ohne Kupffer</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> <PRIZE>4. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Milton</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Verlust des Parabieses</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> <PRIZE>14. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Paragone della Pobsia Tragica dtalia conquella di Francia</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> <PRIZE>5. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><AUTHOR>J. J. Breitingeri</AUTHOR> <TITLE>in Versus obscurciss. Persii diarribe Historico Literaria</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1723.</YEAR> <PRIZE>1. Batzen.</PRIZE></BIBL>
<BIBL><TITLE>Discurse der Mahleren</TITLE>, <VOLUME>4. Theil</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1731.</YEAR> <PRIZE>16. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"Corrections made: (1) Replaced corrupted/mojibake characters (√º, √∏, √†, √¢, √∂, etc.) with proper German characters (ü, ß, ä) based on context; (2) Fixed the mismatched closing tag <PRICE> to <PRIZE> for consistency with the rest of the document; (3) Properly nested the sub-BIBL entries under "Politicorum Libri" and "de Amphitheatro" by closing the parent BIBL tag after their children, since these were originally left unclosed/improperly nested; (4) Escaped the ampersand "&" as "&" in two places (Taciti & Velleji, Notis Integris... & variorum) for XML validity; (5) Fixed a broken word split across lines "Pane- Gyricus" to "Pane-Gyricus"; (6) Ensured every BIBL tag has a matching closing tag, and the overall ITEM tag is properly closed at the end."}

<BIBL><AUTHOR>J. J. Scheuchzers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Vernunfft-mäßige Undersuchung des Baades zu Baaden, mit Kupfferen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1732.</YEAR> <PRIZE>11. ß.</PRIZE></BIBL>

parsed.explanation: Corrections made: (1) Replaced corrupted/mojibake characters (√º, √∏, √†, √¢, √∂, etc.) with proper German characters (ü, ß, ä) based on context; (2) Fixed the mismatched closing tag <PRICE> to <PRIZE> for consistency with the rest of the document; (3) Properly nested the sub-BIBL entries under "Politicorum Libri" and "de Amphitheatro" by closing the parent BIBL tag after their children, since these were originally left unclosed/improperly nested; (4) Escaped the ampersand "&" as "&" in two places (Taciti & Velleji, Notis Integris... & variorum) for XML validity; (5) Fixed a broken word split across lines "Pane- Gyricus" to "Pane-Gyricus"; (6) Ensured every BIBL tag has a matching closing tag, and the overall ITEM tag is properly closed at the end.
